hooks.name: Verify Implementation After Task
hooks.description: After a spec task completes, runs tests and checks that the implementation matches requirements

action.prompt:
A spec task was just completed. Before marking it done, verify the implementation:

1. Run `npm test` from the project root and check for failures
2. Run `npm run lint` and check for errors
3. Check that the code uses the correct enumerations from requirements.md v4.0:
   - PaymentType: CARD | EFT | INTERNAL_TRANSFER
   - IssueCategory: DUPLICATE_DEBIT | FAILED_TRANSFER | MISSING_PAYMENT | UNAUTHORISED_TRANSACTION | INCORRECT_AMOUNT
   - TransactionStatus: SETTLED | PENDING | FAILED | REVERSED
   - RecommendedAction: RESOLVE_NOW | INVESTIGATE | ESCALATE | REFER
   - Priority: CRITICAL | HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW
4. Confirm the triage rule precedence order matches REQ-030 (age > high-value > unauthorised > SLA breach > pending > duplicate > failed transfer > incorrect amount > missing payment > card routing > default)
5. Report pass/fail for each check and flag any issues found.
